title: Nexus WorldKbEntityProjection
description: Flat wire projection of a World KB KeyBlock entity for canvas graph + inspector surfaces (V1.73). `version` maps to the SQLite per-row OCC column (kb_key_blocks.revision, NULL-normalized to 0).

status.description: Promotion lifecycle state: pending | confirmed | rejected | merged | manual | deleted (entity-scope-model §5.5).

version.description: Per-row OCC revision (kb_key_blocks.revision, NULL normalized to 0).

source_anchor_count.description: Number of source-anchor provenance edges referencing this entity.
